column12: Botanical illustration from Curtis's Botanical Magazine, Volume 7, Plate 248, published in 1793; digitally cleaned, colour-adjusted and rotated by CarolSpears

Scientific illustration; not the catalogued specimen. Filename: Acer palmatum - illustration.jpg. Publication: Flore des serres et des jardins de l'Europe. Source institution: Wikimedia Commons. Exact taxon illustration located and downloaded.
